home.title: Your maritime partner between the Iberian Peninsula and the Americas
home.desc: Direct maritime service connecting key ports across Europe, the Caribbean, Central America and the Atlantic coast of Brazil to strengthen your supply chain.
home.benefit2: Offices and agents across multiple continents
home.benefit4: Coverage Iberia ↔ Caribbean, Central America & Brazil
home.aboutP1: Cargo Maritime Global Lines & Trading PLC is a shipping company specialized in the maritime corridor between the Iberian Peninsula and the Americas. We offer reliable and efficient transport solutions, connecting Europe with the Caribbean, Central America and the Atlantic coast of Brazil.
home.aboutP2: Our commitment to operational excellence and cargo safety positions us as the preferred logistics partner for freight forwarders, importers and exporters in the Iberian-American corridor.
home.servicesDesc: Complete maritime transport solutions adapted to each type of cargo.
home.why1Desc: Proven track record in cargo handling and multi-million dollar contracts, offering unmatched expertise in every shipment.
home.why2Desc: The safety and timely delivery of your cargo are our priority, backed by meticulous planning.
home.why3Desc: Discreet and professional presence that drives your business in the competitive international shipping market.
home.testimonial1Text: The Cargo Maritime team showed exceptional professionalism in our first transatlantic operation.
home.testimonial2Text: Impeccable deadline compliance and constant communication throughout the entire shipping process.
home.testimonial3Text: The route coverage and flexibility in cargo types is unmatched in the market.
home.contactDesc: Ready to optimize your shipping operations? Contact us today to learn how Cargo Maritime can enhance your logistics chain between the Iberian Peninsula and the Americas.
home.sailDesc: Connect your cargo with the world. Contact our team of experts today.

servicios.title: Our services
servicios.desc: We offer comprehensive maritime transport solutions for all types of cargo between the Iberian Peninsula and the Americas.
servicios.service1Desc: Handling of non-containerized general cargo. Ideal for oversized or irregularly shaped goods: steel bars, machinery, industrial equipment and timber.
servicios.service2Desc: Cargo consolidation to optimize costs. Your goods share a container, paying only for the space occupied.
servicios.service3Desc: Exclusive container for your cargo. We offer dry containers (20' and 40'), reefer and specials (open top, flat rack, tank).
servicios.service4Desc: Transport of solid and liquid bulk. Fleet with certified holds and hygiene procedures for each product type.
servicios.service5Desc: Vehicles, rolling machinery and construction equipment with specialized ramps. Maximum safety for high-value equipment.
servicios.service6Desc: Tailored solutions for oversized, heavy lift or high-value cargo. Includes structural planning, special permits and technical supervision.
servicios.subTitle: Specialized subcategories

rutas.title: Our shipping routes
rutas.desc: Regular direct lines between the Iberian Peninsula and the main ports of the Americas.
rutas.ctaBanner: We can always help you at any port

nosotros.title: Cargo Maritime Global Lines & Trading PLC
nosotros.p1: We are a shipping company specialized in the maritime corridor between the Iberian Peninsula and the Americas. Founded with the purpose of connecting European and American markets efficiently, reliably and directly.
nosotros.p2: Our presence in key ports across Spain, Portugal, the Caribbean, Central America and Brazil allows us to offer a truly comprehensive service, from pickup at origin to delivery at destination.
nosotros.missionText: To provide reliable, efficient and personalized maritime transport solutions between the Iberian Peninsula and the Americas, contributing to the development of international trade and strengthening our clients' supply chains.
nosotros.visionText: To be the leading operator in the Iberia–America corridor, recognized for our operational excellence, commitment to sustainability and adaptability to the changing needs of global trade.
nosotros.value1Desc: We act with transparency and honesty in all our operations.
nosotros.value2Desc: We honor time commitments with rigor.
nosotros.value3Desc: We think globally with local knowledge at every port.
nosotros.value4Desc: Our clients' success is our success.
